description: Native lab writeback 1:1:1 chain integrity. Uploads Chen's lipid panel with COPILOT_NATIVE_LAB_WRITEBACK_DEMO_MODE=1 and asserts one procedure_order + one procedure_order_code + one procedure_report + one procedure_result per analyte, with procedure_order_code.procedure_order_seq aligned with procedure_report.procedure_order_seq.
what_bug_this_catches: If LabResultWriter::writeOneFact regresses to skipping procedure_order_code insertion, the FHIR Observation laboratory service silently drops the result. This case asserts one procedure_order_code row per analyte tied to the same procedure_order_id, with procedure_order_seq=1 aligned between report and order_code.

input.query: Upload Chen's lipid panel and write back to OpenEMR native lab chain.

db_invariants: for each fact: procedure_result.procedure_report_id references the same procedure_report row that points at procedure_order
